meaning: Federal Energy Administration(美国)联邦能源署
examples: What's missing from the Federal Enterprise Architecture (FEA).
Designed using extensive FEA to minimize stresses and maximize component life.
Analysed this generator's unload static magnetic field by the software of FEA.
Telemundo had a hit novela earlier this year, Betty La Fea (Ugly Betty), but Univision bought it up.
Official figures show Lough Fea in County Tyrone had the highest recorded snowfall in the UK on Friday with 30cms.
